mapper.select: /* CustScheduleMapper.getMinorSmsTrgtList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SVC_TEL_NO , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , C.MINOR_AGENT_NAME AS AGENT_NM , C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN AS AGENT_TEL_NO , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' AS REQUEST_TIME FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_AGENT C WHERE A.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND C.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION IS NOT NULL AND C.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION != '-1' AND 19 > FN_GET_AGE('A', A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE >= '20150416' AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN = '010' AND LENGTH(C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || C.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN) = 11

/* CustScheduleMapper.getEnggCloseNotiList */ SELECT SUBSCRIBER_NO , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '090000' AS REQUEST_TIME FROM VW_CNTR_ENGG_INFO WHERE SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND ENGG_END_DT = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE+28), 'YYYYMMDD')

/* CustScheduleMapper.getEnggDayCloseNotiList */ SELECT SUBSCRIBER_NO , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '090000' AS REQUEST_TIME FROM VW_CNTR_ENGG_INFO WHERE SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND ENGG_END_DT = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE+1), 'YYYYMMDD')

/* CustScheduleMapper.getEnggExtendNotiList */ SELECT SUBSCRIBER_NO, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '090000' AS REQUEST_TIME , SOC_INFO FROM VW_CNTR_ENGG_EXTD WHERE SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND ((ENGG_END_DT = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE-30), 'YYYYMMDD')) or (ENGG_END_DT = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE-60), 'YYYYMMDD')) or (ENGG_END_DT = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE-90), 'YYYYMMDD')) or (ENGG_END_DT = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE-120), 'YYYYMMDD')) or (ENGG_END_DT = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE-150), 'YYYYMMDD')) or (ENGG_END_DT = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE-180), 'YYYYMMDD')))

/* CustScheduleMapper.getRetentionNotiList */ SELECT DISTINCT SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM ( SELECT JUO.CONTRACT_NUM , JUO.SUBSCRIBER_NO , JUO.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , JUO.SUB_STATUS , REQ.LST_RATE_NM , NVL(DVC.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, BL.ENGG_MNTH_CNT) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT , NVL(DVC.ENGG_START_DT, BL.ENGG_START_DT) AS ENGG_START_DT , NVL(DVC.ENGG_END_DT, BL.ENGG_END_DT) AS ENGG_END_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 20, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SIM_STRT_DT , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0010', SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 36, 1)) AS SIM_STAT_NM , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 3, 3)) AS SIM_ENGG_CNT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 28, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SIM_END_DT , CASE WHEN REQ.SIM_INFO IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 28, 8) > NVL(DVC.ENGG_END_DT, BL.ENGG_END_DT) THEN SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 28, 8) ELSE NVL(DVC.ENGG_END_DT, BL.ENGG_END_DT) END AS END_DT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JUO , MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ /* 심플할인 요금제 */ , ( SELECT DISTINCT A.RATE_CD FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , MSP_RATE_SPEC B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'LTE' AND B.SPRT_TP = 'SM' AND B.DC_AMT > 0 AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(B.APPL_STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(B.APPL_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.APPL_STRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(A.APPL_END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') ) SIM /* 할인적용된 경우 */ , ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , MIN(B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT , SUBSTR(MIN(B.APP_START_DD), 1, 8) AS ENGG_START_DT , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(MIN(B.APP_START_DD), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), MIN(B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT)) - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS ENGG_END_DT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.BL_DC_TYPE = 'KD' GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM ) BL /* 기기변경이력 */ , ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , NVL(B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT , SUBSTR(B.APP_START_DD, 1, 8) AS ENGG_START_DT , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.APP_START_DD, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), NVL(B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0)) - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS ENGG_END_DT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST C WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.BL_DC_TYPE = 'KD' AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.EVNT_TRTM_NO = C.EVNT_TRTM_NO AND C.REQUEST_KEY = (SELECT MAX(REQUEST_KEY) FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM) ) DVC WHERE JUO.CONTRACT_NUM = BL.CONTRACT_NUM AND JUO.CONTRACT_NUM = DVC.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND JUO.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM AND SIM.RATE_CD IN REQ.LST_RATE_CD AND JUO.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JUO.USER_SSN)) >= 20 ) WHERE (TO_DATE(END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1 OR TO_DATE(END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-31 OR TO_DATE(END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-61 OR TO_DATE(END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-91 OR TO_DATE(END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-121 OR TO_DATE(END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-151)
